nodes.label: AI as brainstorming aid for writer's block
nodes.grounding_span: they are helpful for when writers block hits

nodes.label: AI control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: the plugin has most of the control when using this

nodes.label: AI usefulness for professional composition
nodes.label_negative: AI useless for professional composition beyond brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: they are simply useless to me as a composer once I get past the brainstorming stage

nodes.label: AI understanding of musical terminology
nodes.grounding_span: these services just straight up don't understand musical terms at all

nodes.label: AI output format usability
nodes.label_negative: AI output format unusable for professional work
nodes.grounding_span: only allow users to download the audio output, not the raw midi data

nodes.label: AI threat to job availability
nodes.grounding_span: one day there will not be any more jobs for people like me

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to rely on these features all the time so I don't get used to not having to do it myself

nodes.label: Professional viability and career sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: Companies won't hire people for things like game audio if a cheap ai service can do it at a good enough level

nodes.label: Creative productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It would really save me a lot of time

nodes.label: Appreciation for AI as writer's block solution
nodes.grounding_span: they are helpful for when writers block hits

nodes.label: Discomfort with AI taking creative control
nodes.grounding_span: I hate to admit it, but the plugin has most of the control

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's limited professional utility
nodes.grounding_span: they are simply useless to me as a composer once I get past the brainstorming stage

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: one day there will not be any more jobs for people like me

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI tools for structural composition
nodes.grounding_span: I would absolutely buy that plugin

nodes.label: Intentional limitation of AI reliance to preserve skill
